summary: The diff implements the vast majority of requirements. All five REQs are substantially addressed: backend room system (REQ-1), collaborative drawing with polling (REQ-2), voice messaging (REQ-3), Room UI with lobby (REQ-4), and updated routes (REQ-5). Minor gaps exist around participant count display and polling-based fetch of new strokes since a sequence number.

missing_requirements.requirement: Backend exposes a function to poll/fetch new strokes since a given timestamp or sequence number
missing_requirements.reason: The backend only exposes getStrokes(roomCode) which returns ALL strokes with no since-parameter filtering. The frontend compensates by slicing client-side via renderedStrokeCount.current, but the AC specifically requires a backend function that accepts a since-timestamp or sequence number.

missing_requirements.requirement: Participant count is visible on the room page
missing_requirements.reason: The Room.tsx page does not display a live participant count fetched from the backend. There is no hook polling a getParticipants or similar function, and the room header shows username and room code but no participant count indicator.

hallucinated_features.description: getAllRoomCodes backend function exposed as a public query
hallucinated_features.reason: No requirement asked for a public endpoint listing all room codes. This was not part of any acceptance criterion.

hallucinated_features.description: migration.mo file added as a separate migration module
hallucinated_features.reason: No requirement mentioned implementing a migration module. This is an infrastructure addition not requested in the build spec.
